ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "nces_district_id" REAL /* NCES District ID */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "public_district_name" TEXT /* Public name of the district */,
  "charter" INTEGER /* Charter status (1=Yes, 0=No) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the district is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the district is located */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* State abbreviation */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the district */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the district was established */,
  "superintendent_name" TEXT /* Name of the district superintendent */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the district's official website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the district */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the district */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the district's main office */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude coordinate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_county FOREIGN KEY ("county") REFERENCES counties ("county_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the city is located */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude coordinate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude coordinate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude coordinate */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the governor */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zips" (
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the zip code is located */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the zip code is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the zip code area */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the zip code area in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude coordinate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district */,
  "math_percentile" REAL /* Math percentile */,
  "read_percentile" REAL /* Reading percentile */,
  "science_percentile" REAL /* Science percentile */,
  "history_percentile" REAL /* History percentile */,
  "foreign_language_percentile" REAL /* Foreign language percentile */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /*  Dropout rate */,
  "attendance_rate" REAL /* Attendance rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geography" (
  "geography_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geography record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district */,
  "display_label" TEXT /* Display label for the geography */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude coordinate */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation above sea level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geography_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geography_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Income */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the district */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the user account was updated */,
  "last_action" TEXT /* Last action performed by the user (e.g., login, query, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., query, report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the database */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the report was updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the report is public (1=Yes, 0=No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
